content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-16, SecureField) but review_information contains placeholder values: demo_user.txt="test", demo_password.txt="changeme", notes.txt="TBD".

Pierre: Apple reviewers cannot access gated core features without working credentials and clear instructions, and placeholder-looking values like "test"/"changeme"/"TBD" often trigger an immediate rejection or a reviewer request for more info. Please provide a real, working demo account and notes explaining how to reach the app's core functionality (e.g., any special steps, expiry, or subscription bypass). Update `fastlane/metadata/*/review_information/` with actionable content before submission.
